ticket.subject: Hi! We received your response and screen recording...
ticket.raw_subject: Hi! We received your response and screen recording...
ticket.description:
Hi! We received your response and screen recording. Thank you so much for taking the time to explain it.

We did set up the rate automation and tested it for the CounterCool product https://laurasgourmet.com/products/countercool

We reverted the settings because it is the production site and didn't want to show any errors on checkout for customers.

I have set up rate automation as you described. The checkout page shows an error that shipping is not available to any address we tested for Guam, Puerto Rico, Marshall Islands, and AA.

The settings are live, and our customers from PR, Guam, Marshall Islands, and AA will see the shipping error. Let me know if you need some time to figure it out.

Also, please respond to support@madebuara.com. Your last response landed in the client's inbox. It delays our response times to you.

Thanks again for your help. Happy to jump on a call if needed.

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Hello Ankur,

Thank you for sharing the screenshots.

Countercool product comes under a shipping class and there is an automation rule created for this shipping class where a shipping zone is also selected.

However, in the shipping zone, the Puerto Rico and Guam are not added. Also, the Match All Conditions option was enabled which should be kept disabled. Please add both Puerto Rico and Guam in the shipping zone and save the changes. Once done check for the rates and confirm.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/cjau7FE6h5idkdTE5UeMqSn0F/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ankur,
 
Thank you for sharing the screenshots. 
 
Countercool product comes under a shipping class and there is an automation rule created for this shipping class where a shipping zone is also selected. 
 
However, in the shipping zone, the Puerto Rico and Guam are not added. Also, the Match All Conditions option was enabled which should be kept disabled. Please add both Puerto Rico and Guam in the shipping zone and save the changes. Once done check for the rates and confirm.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Sagar,


Here's what we want to do:

- CounterCool $15 flat rate per unit for **Contiguous US + AK + HI** shipping zone
- CounterCool $20 flat rate per unit for **Puerto Rico + Guam + Marshall Islands + AA** shipping zone

We created two rate automations using the same shipping class and two different shipping zones. The app should match the Country/State in the checkout page and present the shipping rate for that zone as configured in the app.



Your screenshot suggests adding PR and Guam to the **Contiguous US + AK + HI** shipping zone, which isn't what we want. Doing so would display $15 shipping for PR and Guam.



Sincerely,

Ankur Verma
comments.html_body:
Sagar,

Here's what we want to do:
  • CounterCool $15 flat rate per unit for Contiguous US + AK + HI shipping zone
  • CounterCool $20 flat rate per unit for Puerto Rico + Guam + Marshall Islands + AA shipping zone
We created two rate automations using the same shipping class and two different shipping zones. The app should match the Country/State in the checkout page and present the shipping rate for that zone as configured in the app. 

Your screenshot suggests adding PR and Guam to the Contiguous US + AK + HI shipping zone, which isn't what we want. Doing so would display $15 shipping for PR and Guam.

Sincerely,
Ankur Verma
comments.plain_body:
Sagar, 
  Here's what we want to do:
  CounterCool $15 flat rate per unit for Contiguous US + AK + HI shipping zone  CounterCool $20 flat rate per unit for Puerto Rico + Guam + Marshall Islands + AA shipping zone   We created two rate automations using the same shipping class and two different shipping zones. The app should match the Country/State in the checkout page and present the shipping rate for that zone as configured in the app.   
  Your screenshot suggests adding PR and Guam to the Contiguous US + AK + HI shipping zone, which isn't what we want. Doing so would display $15 shipping for PR and Guam.   
  Sincerely,  Ankur Verma

comments.body:
L3 - Case Related to Rates Failure for Guam and Marshall Islands

Customer has created a shipping zone where he selected Guam, Puerto Rico, Marshall Islands separately and AFA as US-AA (as shown in screenshot 1 below).

The customer has created a rate automation rule named "CounterCool $20 per unit" where this shipping zone is added and a flat rate is added to show at the checkout.

The flat rate set was not shown for Puerto Rico, Guam and Marshall Islands and customer complained the same.

Upon checking, i go to know that when we select the country-state as the option, the rates are provided. So, i selected US-Puerto Rico as the option (as shown in screenshot 1) and the rates are shown for a Puerto Rico address now (screenshot 2 shared below).
I verified this for US-AA and it also worked (screenshot 3 shared below).

However, in the shipping zones, we do not have this option for Guam and Marshall Islands and hence the rates are still not shown for the address related to these two states.

Could you check if we can bring a country state option for Guam and Marshall Islands as well. Let us know of the updates.

Store URL - laurasgourmet.myshopify.com
App - MCSL
Account ID - 060138b4-6aa6-4b3a-adcf-33d6ac355249

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/uGql3bsd5Jb9rtItLTylJvdbQ/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/NuElt7BPOXD0hsjYJcUy5AgeB/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/UB67NGJ0byppzJC5JPYrwNhcz/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
L3 - Case Related to Rates Failure for Guam and Marshall Islands
 
Customer has created a shipping zone where he selected Guam, Puerto Rico, Marshall Islands separately and AFA as US-AA (as shown in screenshot 1 below). 
 
The customer has created a rate automation rule named "CounterCool $20 per unit" where this shipping zone is added and a flat rate is added to show at the checkout.
 
The flat rate set was not shown for Puerto Rico, Guam and Marshall Islands and customer complained the same. 
 
Upon checking, i go to know that when we select the country-state as the option, the rates are provided. So, i selected US-Puerto Rico as the option (as shown in screenshot 1) and the rates are shown for a Puerto Rico address now (screenshot 2 shared below).
I verified this for US-AA and it also worked (screenshot 3 shared below). 
 
However, in the shipping zones, we do not have this option for Guam and Marshall Islands and hence the rates are still not shown for the address related to these two states.
 
Could you check if we can bring a country state option for Guam and Marshall Islands as well. Let us know of the updates.
 
Store URL - laurasgourmet.myshopify.com 
App - MCSL 
Account ID - 060138b4-6aa6-4b3a-adcf-33d6ac355249

comments.body:
Hello Ankur,

We have an update on the case.

A resolution is needed to resolve the case and it would be available in two weeks.

So, for time being, you can create separate zone in shopify for Guam and Marshall Islands and add the flat rate in shopify and show them at the checkout.

We will let you know of the updates.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ankur,
 
We have an update on the case. 
 
A resolution is needed to resolve the case and it would be available in two weeks. 
 
So, for time being, you can create separate zone in shopify for Guam and Marshall Islands and add the flat rate in shopify and show them at the checkout. 
 
We will let you know of the updates.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
